events.label: El Segundo port rounding
events.description: Topaz rounds the El Segundo light buoy to port and sets up for the long offshore reach to Cortez Bank.

events.label: Port tack to clear shipping lane
events.description: Topaz tacks to port to cross the coastal shipping lane and take the favored angle toward Cortez Bank.

events.label: A2 up for the broad reach
events.description: Wind clocks northwest to 18 knots; Topaz douses the jib and hoists the A2 asymmetric for the broad reaching leg to Cortez Bank.

events.label: Broach in 22 knots
events.description: Topaz wipes out on a deep gust, going over to leeward in 22 knots and recovering in under three minutes with no damage.

events.label: Cortez Bank rounding
events.description: Topaz rounds Cortez Bank to port and bears away onto the reaching leg toward Catalina.

events.label: Dawn on the return leg
events.description: Sunrise reveals clear skies as Topaz begins the 130-mile beat back toward Catalina. The fleet is spread across 15 miles of ocean.
